---
title: Homework 1
sidebar: homeworks
---


## Presto Spesa

In this homework you will help Esselunga Supermarkets to parametrize their _Presto Spesa_ system. (Not really, but let's pretend).

You need to complete [this notebook](https://github.com/floswald/CompEcon/raw/refs/heads/main/notebooks/homework0/presto-handout.jl). Here is a [rendered version](https://pluto.land/n/yt8hux1c).


## Homework Submission

1. When: You have 1 week.
2. Who: teams of max 2/3
3. What: one rendered HTML output of your notebook per team. make sure all cells (code?) that you want me to see are *visible* in your notebook, or they won't  be visible in the HTML either.
4. How: dropbox link via slack.
